_comment: AF option/weapon label -> part-slug, for loadout->variant model resolution (Handover I2). Values are Model Forge's baked-variant vocabulary (verbatim); Model Forge reproduces ModelLibrary.variant_slug (sorted, de-duplicated slugs joined by '+') when naming a variant bake '<baseKey>#<slug>'. Keys are matched case-insensitively against a model's distributed loadout labels.
